docs.title: Planned Dates
docs.text: Planning for a two week trip centered around the Dust 2 Dawson rally which is typically the third weekend of June.

docs.title: Rough Itinerary
docs.text:
1. Ferry from Bellingham, WA to Haines, AK.

  2. Ride Haines -> Tok [438 mi]

  3. Tok -> Chicken [77 mi] -> Fairbanks [279 mi]

  4. Fairbanks -> Coldfoot [254 mi]

  5. Coldfoot -> Deadhorse [241 mi]

  6. Deadhorse -> Fairbanks [495 mi]

  7. Fairbanks -> Whitehorse, BC [589 mi]

  8. Whitehorse, BC -> Kitwanga, BC [705 mi]

  9. Kitwanga, BC -> Winthrop, WA
